news.title: SpaceX is heavily reliant on Starlink for growth and profit as it marches toward Nasdaq listing
news.summary: SpaceX's IPO prospectus underscores the importance of Starlink to the company's operations. SpaceX is planning to go public with a $1 billion IPO.

news.title: Oil prices jump more than 3% after Iran supreme leader says uranium must remain in country
news.summary: Iran's position on its enriched uranium will likely complicate peace talks with the U.S. Iran has been accused of enriching uranium to create weapons of mass destruction.

news.title: Quantum stocks soar as U.S. reportedly plans $2 billion ‘award’ and taking equity stakes
news.summary: Quantum computing shares popped following reports that the U.S. government will award grants to nine firms operating in the space. The grants are expected to be announced in the coming weeks.

news.title: AG Blanche meets with GOP senators on Trump's DOJ  fund; Tillis calls it 'stupid'
news.summary: Critics of the "Anti-Weaponization Fund" fear it will give money to Trump supporters who attacked police defending the U.S. Capitol on Jan. 6, 2021.

news.title: Spotify stock pops on guidance at first investor day since 2022
news.summary: Spotify is holding its first investor day in four years. The company is now under the direction of co-CEOs Gustav Söderström and Alex Norstr Öm.

news.title: Mortgage rates jump to more than 6.5% — the highest level since the Iran war started
news.summary: Rates hit an eight-month high but are still lower than they were a year ago. Rates hit anEight-month High but are Still lower than They were a Year ago.

news.title: The surprising cost of caring for aging parents: divorce
news.summary: Mental-health and financial pressures can strain even strong marriages. Mental- health and financial pressure can strainEven strong marriages can strain, experts say.

news.title: This hack can save you hundreds on airfare this summer
news.summary: A new app lets you plan your next vacation by sending text messages to your phone. The app is called Tripit and it was created by the travel company Tripit. The company also created the app to help people plan their trips.

news.title: I accidentally saw my co-worker’s W-2 and she makes $15K more than me for the same job. What should I do?
news.summary: “How do you advocate for yourself without coming off whiny?” she asks. “HowDo you advocate and not come off wh whining?’

news.title: Nvidia can deliver chips — but it can’t buy Big Tech out of its credit and power-grid crisis
news.summary: Corporate profits can’t fix a chaotic trade war with China, climbing credit premiums and AI infrastructure limits, says the IMF.
